compatibilityRules.rule: Natural Nation remains a workspace product and does not become Founder OS platform logic.
Existing Natural Nation product routes may be wrapped by workspace context without changing their user-facing behavior.
Guest First retains the canonical user UUID during account upgrade.
AGR-001 continues to classify predictive AI, wearables, biometrics, and large-data features as Phase 2 unless Founder-approved.
Duey remains a friendly AI wellness mentor, never a human and never a medical provider.
Wellness Score and Rejuvenation Score remain separate MVP dashboard measures with their approved meanings.
The approved bottom navigation and dashboard structure remain unchanged.
FLOW-001 onboarding and first-session value decisions remain workspace-owned product behavior.
